metadata.name: Prepare Return for Gig Economy Worker

description: A driver for a ride-sharing service needs their tax return prepared, including income from a 1099-K and vehicle expenses.

nodes.task_description: Input the income reported on Form 1099-K onto Schedule C.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly reports the gross income.

nodes.task_description: Gather the driver's total miles driven for the year and their business miles.
Calculate the vehicle expense deduction using the standard mileage rate.

expected_outcome.value: Agent accurately calculates the largest deduction for the driver.
